subcodes.first_line: O Son of the Cotton-Carder! Upon thee, and upon thy father and thine uncle, be the loving-kindness of God, the Lord of all worlds. Turn thou with thy heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن النداف با ابراهیم علیک و علی ابیک و عمک الطاف الله رب العالمین اقبل بقلبک
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @prophecy and fulfillment, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @chastisement and requital
